title: dacryodes floribunda
intro: Dacryodes floribunda, also known as the canarium nut tree, is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The canarium nut tree is said to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Dacryodes floribunda seeds are typically used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and oil extractions, which are employed to treat various ailments.
intro_study: According to "Phytochemistry", dacryodes floribunda benefits include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, cytotoxic, antidiabetes, antioxidant, antidiarrheal, and antiprotozoal activities.
